title: Login button not working
description: User cannot click the login button on the homepage. It appears grayed out.

title: Database connection timeout
description: The application throws a timeout error when connecting to the database during peak hours.

title: UI alignment issue
description: The text in the navigation bar is misaligned on mobile devices.

title: API endpoint returning 500
description: The /api/users endpoint is returning a 500 internal server error intermittently.

title: Memory leak in image processing
description: The image processing module is causing memory leaks after multiple uploads.

title: CSS styling broken
description: The CSS styles are not loading properly in Firefox browser.

title: Authentication failure
description: Users are unable to authenticate using OAuth providers.

title: Responsive design fix
description: The website layout breaks on tablets with screen width between 768px and 1024px.

title: Performance optimization
description: The page load time is over 5 seconds on average.

title: Broken link in footer
description: The contact link in the footer redirects to a 404 page.

title: Data validation error
description: Form submissions are accepted even with invalid email formats.

title: Search functionality slow
description: The search feature takes more than 10 seconds to return results.

title: Color contrast issue
description: Text color does not meet accessibility standards for color contrast.

title: Session timeout
description: User sessions expire too quickly, causing frequent logouts.

title: Image upload failure
description: Users cannot upload images larger than 2MB.

title: API rate limiting
description: The API is not properly rate limiting requests, leading to abuse.

title: Mobile app crash
description: The mobile app crashes when users try to access the settings page.

title: Push notification delay
description: Push notifications are delayed by several minutes.

title: App store rejection
description: The app was rejected from the app store due to guideline violations.

title: Offline mode not working
description: The app does not function properly in offline mode.

title: GPS location inaccurate
description: The GPS location tracking is inaccurate on Android devices.

title: Payment gateway error
description: Payments are failing with error code 400 from the gateway.

title: Email notification not sent
description: Users are not receiving email notifications for account activities.

title: File download corrupted
description: Downloaded files are corrupted and cannot be opened.
